title: Emberveil Appearance (v1)
description: Cosmetic layer. Maps an appearance id to a sprite set (used by spriteUtils). Any class can wear any appearance.

sprite.description: Sprite key prefix, e.g. 'warrior' → images/spritecook/warrior_portrait.png + warrior_east.png, etc.

classDefault.description: Optional: the class this was originally built for.
